title: Validation state composite (canon shared, v2.32)
description: Composite validation: cycle stage (validation-status) + orthogonal confidence + source. Audit Phase B v2.32. Backward compat: validation-status.json keeps standalone existence for entities that don't need confidence. Use this composite via $ref when entity benefits from confidence tracking.

confidence.description: Orthogonal to status. 0.0-0.3 weak signal. 0.4-0.7 moderate. 0.8-1.0 strong. A tested entity can be high or low confidence; a validated entity can lose confidence if recent perf wobbles.
